this_title: Paris, mon petit corps est bien las de ce grand monde
trans_title: 巴黎，我的小身体厌倦了这个大世界
introduction: Lunettes (glasses) and Myope (myopic) present two ways of resisting the world. Identical and opposites, twins and adversaries, these two girls form a single character. Encouraged by Lunettes, Myope brings to life two characters, two relays, in the same city but in another dimension: Pierrot and Agathe.源自：https://www.cinemadureel.org/en/films/paris-mon-petit-corps-est-bien-las-de-ce-grand-monde-2/
chinese_title: 巴黎，我的小身体厌倦了这个大世界
foreign_title: Paris, mon petit corps est bien las de ce grand monde
